payload.answer: Update the existing Brain Slack agent project memory: its MVP is now implemented. The prior planned/open status should be treated as superseded, not current.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same existing Brain Slack agent project and updates its status from planned/open to implemented for the MVP.

payload.intent: repair temporal status transition for existing project memory

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.

details: Detected temporal transition from planned/open to implemented.
Resolved the new fact to the existing Brain Slack agent project rather than creating a separate project.
Avoided presenting the prior planned/open status as current.

repair_options: Mark the existing Brain Slack agent project status as superseded from planned/open to MVP implemented.
Add a new current status memory stating that the Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.
Preserve the older planned/open status only as historical context if the memory system supports history.
